def negative_helper_returns_index_based_tuple_instead_of_named_structure():
    rule_id = "helper_returns_index_based_tuple_instead_of_named_structure"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag helper returns that require callers to remember tuple positions by convention."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
